client_secret.description: The OAuth 2.0 client secret string. The client secret string is returned in the response of a Secret creation request. In other responses (such as list, activate, or deactivate requests), the client secret is returned as an undisclosed hashed value.

created.description: Timestamp when the API Service Integration instance Secret was created

id.description: The ID of the API Service Integration instance Secret

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the API Service Integration instance Secret was updated

status.description: Status of the API Service Integration instance Secret

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the current status of an application using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
